name: Samurai Chess
short_description: The classical game of chess... now with samurai warriors! Play chess against your friends or versus the computer, unlock new scenarios and chess pieces, and prove yourself to be a real samurai.
detailed_description:
The classical game of chess... now with samurai warriors! Play chess against your friends (locally) or versus the computer, unlock new scenarios and chess pieces, and prove yourself to be a real samurai.

Features:

  • Play against the computer with 3 different difficult levels;

  • Unlock up to 12 beautiful scenarios for you to play in;

  • Unlock 2 more chess pieces, with more elaborate designs and armor;

  • Play against your friends locally or just have fun against the computer;

  • Originally composed soundtrack to get you in the mood.
